'''âg-dh-n''' ('''gadhana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macgyver|macgyver]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macgyver|macgyver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-dh-n
|-
! Lemma
| gadhana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gadhanithi|gadhanithi]] || [[word:gadhaniji|gadhaniji]] || [[word:gadhanishi|gadhanishi]] || [[word:gadhani|gadhani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhanuthuth|gadhanuthuth]] || [[word:gadhanujuj|gadhanujuj]] || [[word:gadhanushush|gadhanushush]] || [[word:gadhan|gadhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhanuthu|gadhanuthu]] || [[word:gadhanuju|gadhanuju]] || [[word:gadhanushu|gadhanushu]] || [[word:gadhanu|gadhanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhanufuth|gadhanufuth]] || [[word:gadhanufuj|gadhanufuj]] || [[word:gadhanufush|gadhanufush]] || [[word:gadhanuf|gadhanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gadhanethe|gadhanethe]] || [[word:gadhaneje|gadhaneje]] || [[word:gadhaneshe|gadhaneshe]] || [[word:gadhane|gadhane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhanothoth|gadhanothoth]] || [[word:gadhanojoj|gadhanojoj]] || [[word:gadhanoshosh|gadhanoshosh]] || [[word:gadhan|gadhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhanotho|gadhanotho]] || [[word:gadhanojo|gadhanojo]] || [[word:gadhanosho|gadhanosho]] || [[word:gadhano|gadhano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhanofoth|gadhanofoth]] || [[word:gadhanofoj|gadhanofoj]] || [[word:gadhanofosh|gadhanofosh]] || [[word:gadhanof|gadhanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gadhanĂŠthĂŠ|gadhanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gadhanĂŠjĂŠ|gadhanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gadhanĂŠshĂŠ|gadhanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gadhanĂŠ|gadhanĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhanathath|gadhanathath]] || [[word:gadhanajaj|gadhanajaj]] || [[word:gadhanashash|gadhanashash]] || [[word:gadhan|gadhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhanatha|gadhanatha]] || [[word:gadhanaja|gadhanaja]] || [[word:gadhanasha|gadhanasha]] || [[word:gadhana|gadhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhanafath|gadhanafath]] || [[word:gadhanafaj|gadhanafaj]] || [[word:gadhanafash|gadhanafash]] || [[word:gadhanaf|gadhanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gadhanasha|gadhanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogadhanasha|gogadhanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigadhanasha|gokigadhanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gadhanĂŒsha|gadhanĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogadhanknĂŒsha|gogadhanknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigadhanĂŒsha|gokigadhanĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gadhanshĂ«sha|gadhanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogadhankshĂ«sha|gogadhankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigadhanshĂ«sha|gokigadhanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gadhanrosha|gadhanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogadhankrosha|gogadhankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigadhanrosha|gokigadhanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhanmusha|gadhanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogadhankmusha|gogadhankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhanmusha|gokigadhanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gadhansherasha|gadhansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogadhanksherasha|gogadhanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigadhansherasha|gokigadhansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gadhangasha|gadhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogadhankngasha|gogadhankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigadhangasha|gokigadhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gadhanyasha|gadhanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogadhankyasha|gogadhankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigadhanyasha|gokigadhanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gadhanyamasha|gadhanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogadhankyamasha|gogadhankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigadhanyamasha|gokigadhanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gadhanĂŒshĂ«sha|gadhanĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogadhanknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogadhanknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigadhanĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigadhanĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gadhanĂŒrosha|gadhanĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogadhanknĂŒrosha|gogadhanknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigadhanĂŒrosha|gokigadhanĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhanĂŒmusha|gadhanĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogadhanknĂŒmusha|gogadhanknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhanĂŒmusha|gokigadhanĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gadhanshĂ«nĂŒsha|gadhanshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogadhankshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogadhankshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigadhanshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigadhanshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gadhanshĂ«rosha|gadhanshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogadhankshĂ«rosha|gogadhankshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigadhanshĂ«rosha|gokigadhanshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhanshĂ«musha|gadhanshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogadhankshĂ«musha|gogadhankshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhanshĂ«musha|gokigadhanshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gadhanronĂŒsha|gadhanronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogadhankronĂŒsha|gogadhankronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigadhanronĂŒsha|gokigadhanronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gadhanroshĂ«sha|gadhanroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogadhankroshĂ«sha|gogadhankroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigadhanroshĂ«sha|gokigadhanroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhanromusha|gadhanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogadhankromusha|gogadhankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhanromusha|gokigadhanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gadhanmunĂŒsha|gadhanmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogadhankmunĂŒsha|gogadhankmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigadhanmunĂŒsha|gokigadhanmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gadhanmushĂ«sha|gadhanmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogadhankmushĂ«sha|gogadhankmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigadhanmushĂ«sha|gokigadhanmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gadhanmurosha|gadhanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogadhankmurosha|gogadhankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigadhanmurosha|gokigadhanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gadhan|gadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠn|gĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogadhan|hogadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠdhĂŠn|hogĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogadhan|hohogadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠdhĂŠn|hohogĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgadhan|nĂŒgadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠdhĂŠn|nĂŒgĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgadhan|nĂŒnĂŒgadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠdhĂŠn|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgadhan|nĂŻgadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠdhĂŠn|nĂŻgĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgadhan|nĂŻnĂŻgadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠdhĂŠn|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugadhan|lugadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠdhĂŠn|lugĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugadhan|lulugadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠdhĂŠn|lulugĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligadhan|ligadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠdhĂŠn|ligĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligadhan|liligadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠdhĂŠn|liligĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogadhan|kogadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠdhĂŠn|kogĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogadhan|kokogadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠdhĂŠn|kokogĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegadhan|kegadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠdhĂŠn|kegĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegadhan|kekegadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠdhĂŠn|kekegĂŠdhĂŠn]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
